Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension

Interface ExtensibleIntegerVerifier<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>

Type Parameters:
S - the type of verifier returned by the methods
T - the type of the value being verified
All Superinterfaces:
ExtensibleComparableVerifier<S,​T>, ExtensibleNumberVerifier<S,​T>, ExtensibleObjectVerifier<S,​T>
All Known Subinterfaces:
IntegerVerifier<T>, PrimitiveIntegerVerifier<T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
IntegerVerifierImpl, IntegerVerifierNoOp, LongVerifierImpl, PrimitiveIntegerVerifierImpl, PrimitiveIntegerVerifierNoOp
public interface ExtensibleIntegerVerifier<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
extends ExtensibleNumberVerifier<S,​T>
Verifies the requirements of an integer value but the implementing verifier is not guaranteed to be a IntegerVerifier.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    S isNotWholeNumber()
    Deprecated.
    the actual value is always a whole number
    S isWholeNumber()
    Deprecated.
    the actual value is always a whole number

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleComparableVerifier

    isBetween, isBetweenClosed, isComparableTo, isComparableTo, isGreaterThan, isGreaterThan, isGreaterThanOrEqualTo, isGreaterThanOrEqualTo, isLessThan, isLessThan, isLessThanOrEqualTo, isLessThanOrEqualTo, isNotComparableTo, isNotComparableTo

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleNumberVerifier

    isMultipleOf, isMultipleOf, isNegative, isNotMultipleOf, isNotMultipleOf, isNotNegative, isNotPositive, isNotZero, isPositive, isZero

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleObjectVerifier

    asString, asString, getActual, isActualAvailable, isEqualTo, isEqualTo, isInstanceOf, isNotEqualTo, isNotEqualTo, isNotInstanceOf, isNotNull, isNotOneOf, isNotSameObjectAs, isNull, isOneOf, isSameObjectAs

  • Method Details

    • isWholeNumber

      @Deprecated S isWholeNumber()
      Deprecated.
      the actual value is always a whole number
      Ensures that the actual value is a whole value.
      Specified by:
      isWholeNumber in interface ExtensibleNumberVerifier<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
      Returns:
      the updated verifier

    • isNotWholeNumber

      @Deprecated S isNotWholeNumber()
      Deprecated.
      the actual value is always a whole number
      Ensures that the actual value is not a whole value.
      Specified by:
      isNotWholeNumber in interface ExtensibleNumberVerifier<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
